    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    T

    Theme - Class in utils.themes
    Represents a single named color theme for WigglyPaint.
    Theme(String) - Constructor for class utils.themes.Theme
    Creates a theme by loading all required color keys from the config file.
    ThemeManager - Class in utils.themes
    Global theme manager for WigglyPaint.
    ThemeManager() - Constructor for class utils.themes.ThemeManager
     
    themeMenu - Variable in class gui.MenuPane
    Context menu for selecting themes (classic / pastel).
    toBufferedImage(byte[][]) - Method in class canvas.CanvasData
    Converts a framebuffer into a BufferedImage.
    toInternalX(double) - Method in class gui.CanvasPane
    Converts an X coordinate from display space (scaled) into internal pixel-art space (200×200).
    toInternalY(double) - Method in class gui.CanvasPane
    Converts a Y coordinate from display space into internal space.
